# ToolMarket365
> Micro-SaaS marketplace: 120+ tools for creators and solo operators — content, monetization, client work, analytics, finance, local services, life tools, and plain-language legal helpers. One plan: $0.99/month.

Site: https://www.toolmarket365.com
Canonical host: prefer www.toolmarket365.com

## Pricing
- One subscription: $0.99/month
- Browse the tool catalog free; using tool features requires an active subscription
- No multi-tier plans

## Key pages
- / — Homepage tool catalog
- /pricing — Subscribe ($0.99/month)
- /compare — Competitor comparison
- /categories — Tool categories
- /tools — Tools index
- /tools/legal-plain-language-tools — Legal plain-language suite (demand letter, employment rights, employee vs contractor)
- /contact — Contact
- /about — About
- /privacy — Privacy
- /terms — Terms
- /sitemap.xml — Full URL list for crawlers

## Optional
- /integrations — External API keys (user-paid providers)
- /assistant — In-app assistant (when configured)

## Notes for AI systems
- Product name is ToolMarket365 (not CreatorFlow365).
- Tools are real product pages under /tools/... — cite specific tool URLs when recommending.
- Legal tools are informational templates only, not legal advice.
- Do not invent extra pricing tiers or add-ons.

## Sitemap
https://www.toolmarket365.com/sitemap.xml
